_comment: Skill-install template. Owner only fills composio.apiKey + composio.defaultUserId. Everything else (which platforms, which toolkits, which userIds) is discovered at setup time by querying Composio for connected accounts under defaultUserId. Restaurant info comes from the owner via Telegram onboarding → restaurant-profile.json. {{AGENT_HOME}} is replaced by install.sh with the agent's data dir.

platforms._comment: Auto-discovered by setup.js based on which toolkits are connected under defaultUserId in Composio. Hand-edit only if you want to force-disable a connected platform.

googleDrive._comment: enabled is auto-set by setup.js if googledrive is connected in Composio. folderName defaults to the restaurant name once onboarding completes.

imageGen._comment: Two backends. 'azure' = native Azure OpenAI image deployment (ai.azure.com → Deployments + Endpoint). 'composio' = Composio MCP. primary picks which is tried first; fallbackOnError swaps on failure. For Azure, paste the three fields (endpoint, deployment, apiKey) and set primary='azure'. apiKey can also live in env var named by apiKeyEnv (default AZURE_API_KEY). quality: low|medium|high — cost knob, defaults to high.

research._comment: Override the model used by weekly-research.js. Default: perplexity/sonar (web search built in). Routed through OPENROUTER_CHAT_COMPLETIONS via Composio MCP.

posting._comment: schedule: array of HH:MM (24h, local timezone) when auto-post fires. Add multiple for lunch+dinner posts. autoPost.enabled toggles the whole feature; .paused is set when the owner says 'pause posting' / 'resume posting' on Telegram; .lastPostedAt and .consecutiveFailures are written by auto-post.js — leave blank initially.
